items.title: How Manager can check the status of the Coachings assigned to My Team
items.description: Managers can view and check for the status of the coachings assigned to their reportees.

items.title: How to create a Video Coaching assignment.
items.description: Only users with Editor and Manager role can create a coaching assignment.

items.title: How to create Field Coaching
items.description: Only the user with editor role can create a field coaching

items.title: How to enable the Streaming Links for Video Coaching
items.description: Go to Editor > Coaching > Video Coaching > View Coaching. Click on 'Create Coaching' button.

items.title: How to reset a coaching video
items.description: Only Editor who has created the coaching can reset a video coaching assignment.

items.title: How to review a field coaching as a manager/2nd level manager
How to review a video coaching assignment.
items.description: Only users with Editor and Manager role can review a coaching video.

items.title: How to set competencies.
items.description: Only users with Admin role can add/modify competencies.

items.title: How to share a Coaching Video.

items.title: Video Coaching
items.description: Submit a recorded pitch, get scored by managers against a rubric.

items.title: What is 'My Team Coaching'?
items.description: 'My Team Coaching' enables the manager to view the coaching that has been assigned to all her team members.
